'''鈭歞-y-ng-m''' ('''kadayngemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ebonize|ebonize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-y-ng-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ebonize|ebonize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-y-ng-m
|-
! Lemma
| kadayngemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidayngemoko|thidayngemoko]] || [[word:jidayngemoko|jidayngemoko]] || [[word:shidayngemoko|shidayngemoko]] || [[word:kidayngemoko|kidayngemoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodayngemoko|thodayngemoko]] || [[word:jodayngemoko|jodayngemoko]] || [[word:shodayngemoko|shodayngemoko]] || [[word:kodayngemoko|kodayngemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dayngemoko|th忙dayngemoko]] || [[word:j忙dayngemoko|j忙dayngemoko]] || [[word:sh忙dayngemoko|sh忙dayngemoko]] || [[word:k忙dayngemoko|k忙dayngemoko]]
|-

|-
